title: arenaria serpyllifolia var. neelgherrensis
intro: Arenaria serpyyllifolia var. neelgherrensis, also known as Neelgherries or Sandwort, is a plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family. It is a low-growing, perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria serpyllifolia var. neelgherrensis include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Arenaria serpyllifolia var. neelgherrensis can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
